form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (21.28) in a Class 5, finishing a 5 length second. Has four wins and eight placings from 16 starts from the draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Has been racing extremely well, putting four wins together. Had plenty of support last start when he won easily by 5 lengths at this track (20.94) beating Kiwi Sea in a Class 5 on April 1. The one to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Manukau to win by a long neck in 18.59, beating Portland Mark. Last start finished 5th in a Class 5 on April 4 over 318m at Manukau behind Portland Mark beaten 4.5 lengths (18.91). Not far away last time but this is a stiff test.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 4 over 318m at Manukau behind Hanzo River beaten 4.5 lengths (18.92) in a Class 4. Right in the mix here.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 318m at Manukau beaten 2.25 lengths (18.74) behind Portland Mark in a Class 5 on April 4. Has clocked a blistering 21.03 Best Time here at the trip. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

form.formComment: Placed last time (21.32) at this track in a Class 5, finishing third and beaten 5.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting five victories and 11 places from 25 starts. Has claims with the right run.
